_auth_example._comment: Example only (ignored by the loader). To capture logged-in pages: rename this key to `auth`, then mark routes with auth:true. Credentials are NEVER stored here — set VRT_USERNAME and VRT_PASSWORD as CircleCI env vars. Override the env var names with usernameEnv/passwordEnv if needed.
_auth_example._preFormSelector_comment: Optional: a selector for a button/toggle that reveals a hidden username/password form. It is clicked ONLY when the username field isn't already visible — so themes that auto-expand the form under automation (navigator.webdriver) won't get toggled back closed. Leave empty to skip.
